title: Natarajasundaram Pillai, the nagaswaram player who excelled in complex rhythms
description: Pallavi Natarajasundaram Pillai, as he was known, was renowned for mallaris. The available recordings are an invaluable documentation of his style and a testimony to his astonishing grip on layam or thalam. There would be no dull moment in a concert by Natarajasundaram Pillai, says thavil maestro Haridwaramangalam A.K. Palanivel
